name: project-space
description: Local-first project workspace runtime with React web, Go backend, MCP, and native shells.

scripts.dev: scripts/env-run.sh sh -c 'cd backend && go run ./cmd/project-space serve'
scripts.check: bun run web:build && bun run backend:check && bun run desktop:macos:build
scripts.backend:build: mkdir -p dist && cd backend && go build -o ../dist/project-space ./cmd/project-space
scripts.secrets:doctor: scripts/env-run.sh sh -c 'cd backend && go run ./cmd/project-space secrets doctor'
